title: alnus hirsuta f. sibirica
intro: Alnus hirsuta f. sibirica, also known as the Siberian alder, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the alder family, Betulaceae. The Siberian alder is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved respiratory health, and antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the Siberian alder is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in traditional medicine practices, particularly in Russia and other parts of Eastern Europe.
